title: Zhengels's techguns addon
description:
This mod adds missing crafting recepies, items and structures for the techguns mod.

This is techguns addon, so you need to install techguns mod.
body:
Now you can craft laser weapons, armour(hellish battle armor, MK2 power armor), explosion protection armor upgrade and a UV emitter for the reaction chamber.
